appraisal_events.evidence: « je ne la laissais circuler que sous ma tutelle, dans un prolongement extérieur de la séquestration, et d'où je la retirais à l'heure que je voulais »; « Albertine, moitié inconstance, moitié docilité, oubliait vite ce qu'elle avait désiré »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator frames Albertine as controlled by him and characterizes her as inconstant and docile, locally reducing her agency and esteem.

status_effects.explanation: Albertine is depicted as allowed to move only under the narrator’s tutelage and withdrawn at his will, signaling constrained inclusion and reduced autonomy.
